task.title: Editing a preprocessor definition
task.shortdesc: You can edit a local, site-developed preprocessor definition in a property group.

keywords.indexterm: editing a preprocessor definition in a property group

taskbody.prereq: You must define a property group on a local or remote system.

steps.stepsection: To edit a preprocessor definition in a property group:

step.cmd: Open a property group in the property group editor.
Open the Local Preprocessors page of Local COBOL Settings or Local PL/I Settings.
In the Preprocessors section, highlight a preprocessor name.
step.stepresult: The fields in the Preprocessor Options section show the current options for the highlighted preprocessor.

step.info: See the context-sensitive help for a detailed description of the fields.

step.cmd: Press Ctrl+S to save your changes.
